CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Set For Trial On Dec-31-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Default Money Judgment
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Off Calendar

Defendant Txt, Llc'S Motion To Vacate Default (Set Per Ex Parte Hearing On May-3-2012; Supplemental Opp May Be Filed By May-4)
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eric McFarland, Esq., of Thompson, Welch, Soroko & Gilbert LLP, Tel. 415.448.5000, appearing for defendant and moving party.
Timothy J. Kodani, Esq., of Law Offices of Timothy J. Kodani, Tel. 415.951.4640, appearing for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. After hearing, DEFENDANT TXT, LLC'S MOTON TO VACATE DEFAULT is granted. Defendant to file an answer no later than May 11, 2012. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR # 5153

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Continued To Jun-22-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Default Money Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-10-2012 Continued To May-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Timothy Kodani, Esq. and William Gilg, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Leeandra Glover.
Eric McFarland, Esq. for Defaulted Defendant TXT LLC dba Cat Club.

Mr. McFarland stated to the court that there was a stipulated agreement by counsel to vacate the Default entered, but was not file and there was no order granted since submitted to Dept. 610.
After hearing the arguement by counsel, the court continued the hearing to 05-08-12 per stipulation by the parties, pending the hearing in L & M to vacate the Default entered.
